title: Rei is quiet
wikitext:
[]: Rei is quiet..             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Nov 18, 2005 1:03 pm Is she conserved or just not all there? (Reserved? Conservative? Reservative?)

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Nov 18, 2005 1:45 pm ...Why is this here?

[]:             Quote Post by rb_182_ » Fri Nov 18, 2005 3:09 pm this should probably be in the general chat forum

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Fri Nov 18, 2005 3:31 pm I've found that after a few drinks she becomes quite talkative and bubbly.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Nov 18, 2005 3:33 pm I think the way Gendo raised her mader her the way she is if I get your question right.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Wed Nov 23, 2005 11:26 am Well, she is a deprived human-clone, so you can't really blame her.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Sat Nov 26, 2005 10:16 am She seemed to be quite chatty with Gendo in episodeâ€¦ hmmmâ€¦ four

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sun Nov 27, 2005 3:02 pm indeed it twas 4. I think she just doesnt say anything unless its absolutly nessicery. or if someone talks to her first.

[]: Re: Rei is quiet..             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 27, 2005 7:19 pm poetic_assassin wrote: Is she conserved or just not all there?

[]: Re: Rei is quiet..             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Nov 27, 2005 7:33 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: poetic_assassin wrote: Is she conserved or just not all there?

[]:             Quote Post by geishaboy » Sun Nov 27, 2005 11:16 pm I love the quiet types.... :oops:

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Mon Nov 28, 2005 1:35 am Zugzwang wrote: She seemed to be quite chatty with Gendo in episodeâ€¦ hmmmâ€¦ four

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Mon Nov 28, 2005 6:24 am Rei is quiet....and that's good. Right?

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Nov 28, 2005 7:38 am Rei, like Gendou, rarely opens up. But when she does, she is a normal human. As is hinted at in episode 4 where you see Rei smiling and talking to a smiling Gendou.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 28, 2005 11:33 am TsubasaNoKoikokoro wrote: Rei, like Gendou, rarely opens up. But when she does, she is a normal human. As is hinted at in episode 4 where you see Rei smiling and talking to a smiling Gendou.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Mon Nov 28, 2005 12:48 pm about that, Rei could just be putting on a happy face to make gendo happy, asfar as she knows at that point she was created in his lab so its best to make your maker happy :roll: ...right... or she could just be lulling him into false scence of security only to take his hand off later lol.

[]:             Quote Post by rei-freak » Mon Nov 28, 2005 7:11 pm TsubasaNoKoikokoro wrote: Rei, like Gendou, rarely opens up. But when she does, she is a normal human. As is hinted at in episode 4 where you see Rei smiling and talking to a smiling Gendou.

[]:             Quote Post by TsubasaNoKoikokoro » Mon Nov 28, 2005 7:12 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: TsubasaNoKoikokoro wrote: Rei, like Gendou, rarely opens up. But when she does, she is a normal human. As is hinted at in episode 4 where you see Rei smiling and talking to a smiling Gendou.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Tue Nov 29, 2005 12:41 am ..... ..... ..... >.< So much to work with here! REALLY! ARGH!!! *holds head* Rei's quiet and the sky is blue. Rei's quiet and fish swim in water. (I understand that some fish don't swim in water, but Rei's not always quiet.)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 29, 2005 8:57 am TsubasaNoKoikokoro wrote: True, but we also see her smile another time when she is alone with Gendou and no one else. I forget the episode but I think it might be 17, when they load her data into the dummy plug.
